S.FORM: Akihito I 1933 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci Akihito, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Japan anini i ci Akihito, patirengan a romi'ad i 1989 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: akińßito~u i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i akińßito~u, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u *apan anini i ¶i akińßito~u, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Akihito I 1933 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci Akihito, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Japan anini i ci Akihito, patirengan a romi'ad i 1989 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
